name: Hamming
description: Hamming — AI test automation platform for LLM applications with simulation, regression testing, and quality scoring.

seo.title: Hamming — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Hamming: Hamming — AI test automation platform for LLM applications with simulation, regression testing, and quality scoring.

when_to_use: Running automated evals on voice AI agents at scale
Detecting regressions in conversational AI quality over releases
Simulating thousands of user conversations for QA coverage
Measuring agent accuracy and latency across scenario suites

pros: Strong simulation and regression tests for voice agents
Built for production, not just benchmarks
cons: Niche focus on conversational AI limits appeal
Requires test dataset investment to pay off
Smaller ecosystem than Langsmith or Langfuse
review.verdict: Narrow but sharp tool for teams shipping voice and LLM agents that need reliable eval.
review.best_for: Voice AI and LLM app teams running regression and eval at scale
review.not_for: Teams doing simple single-turn LLM calls without agent complexity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
